headline: Exelon (EXC) Price Target Increased to $52 Following Favorable Order by Maryland PSC
summary: Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) is included among the 15 Utility Stocks with Highest Dividends. Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) is one of the country’s largest utility companies, serving more than 10 million customers through six fully regulated transmission and distribution utilities. On April 2, BMO Capital slightly raised its price target on Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) from $51 to […]

headline: How The Story Is Shifting For Exelon (EXC) As Capex Plans And Targets Evolve
summary: Exelon’s refreshed fair value estimate of US$51.41, up from US$50.88, points to a roughly 1.1% adjustment in the latest price target work. Recent Street research, with price targets moving into the low to high US$50s and ratings shifting around Q4 results and capex updates, helps explain why analysts are fine tuning their views rather than making wholesale changes. Read on to see how to track these price target moves and what they might mean for how the Exelon story evolves from here. Stay...
